name: Unit
description: Unit — US banking-as-a-service platform offering FDIC-insured accounts, ACH, wire, card issuing, and lending APIs for fintechs.

seo.title: Unit — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Unit: Unit — US banking-as-a-service platform offering FDIC-insured accounts, ACH, wire, card issuing, and lending APIs for fintechs.

when_to_use: FDIC-insured bank accounts and ACH for US fintech startups
Card issuing and lending APIs for embedded finance products
Wire transfers and bank account opening via BaaS API

pros: Accounts, cards, ACH, wire, lending unified
cons: Sponsor bank risk post-US BaaS turbulence
review.verdict: One of the best-documented US BaaS platforms — just vet your assigned sponsor bank carefully before launch.
review.best_for: US fintech startups needing full-stack banking APIs with modern developer experience
review.not_for: Non-US teams or companies needing a plain payment gateway
